scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix ./common --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix ./back --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix ./front --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix ./games/catan/catan-back --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix ./games/catan/catan-front --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix ./games/cah/cah-back --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix ./games/cah/cah-front --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build-all: npm run build --prefix ./common && npm run build --prefix ./games/catan/catan-back && npm run build --prefix ./games/catan/catan-front && npm run build --prefix ./games/cah/cah-back && npm run build --prefix ./games/cah/cah-front && npm run build --prefix ./front && npm run build --prefix ./back
